overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a dark, stormy pine forest at dusk. The character traverses a winding dirt path, crosses a shallow stream, and continues through the misty woodland with mountains visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense pine forest with winding dirt trail

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the forest path, his armor reflecting the dim storm light

entered.detail: towering evergreen trees forming dense forest canopy
narrow winding trail through the forest undergrowth
leafless dead tree standing among the pines
misty mountain silhouette visible through the trees
dark turbulent clouds covering the sky

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a narrow dirt trail through a dense pine forest. The scene is dominated by tall evergreen trees and dark storm clouds, with a distant mountain peak barely visible through the mist. The lighting is dim and moody, characteristic of a stormy dusk.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow forest stream with rocky bed

events.description: ground surface transitions from dirt path to shallow stream water

agents.ego_description: Geralt wading through the shallow stream, water splashing around his boots as he crosses

entered.detail: shallow flowing water covering the forest path
smooth stones visible beneath the water surface

segments.scene_description: The forest opens slightly as Geralt enters a shallow stream. The water flows over rocks where the path used to be, and the tree density decreases near the water's edge. The character continues walking through the ankle-deep water toward the opposite bank.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail with distant mountain views

events.description: exiting the stream back onto the muddy forest path

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing along the wet forest trail, heading toward the distant mountains

entered.detail: muddy trail continuing from the stream crossing
expansive mountain range becoming visible through the trees

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the stream, Geralt continues along the now muddy trail. The forest remains dense with pines, but the view opens up to reveal a full mountain range in the distance. The path winds forward through the undergrowth toward the misty peaks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense, stormy pine forest that gradually opens to reveal a distant mountain range. It begins with Geralt walking along a narrow dirt trail under dim, moody lighting and heavy storm clouds, with only a single peak visible through the mist. As the path leads forward, the forest opens slightly and the terrain shifts as the character enters a shallow stream, wading through ankle-deep water over smooth rocks. The scene then transitions back to a muddy trail on the opposite bank, where the tree density fluctuates as the path winds through the undergrowth. Finally, the view expands fully to reveal a sprawling mountain range looming behind the misty woodland.
